series_metadata.series_description: Consists of complaint forms used to file complaints against Registered Sanitarian and Sanitarians-in-Training, along with investigation reports, notes, evidence, and statements.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office for 5 years. If complaints are unsubstantiated, then destroy. For complaints which require disciplinary action, retain in office until hearing is conducted and all appeals have been exhausted. Retain in office for additional 5 years, then destroy, Paper: Shred
